prompt: A callback service builds correct external URLs through one configured proxy, but regional deployments use proxy ranges and multi-hop forwarding. Reports show that some generated links use an internal origin while attacker-supplied forwarding values can be selected at another ingress. Diagnose the ownership boundary and repair trusted proxy matching plus forwarded-hop resolution. Preserve direct-request and one-hop behavior. Trust entries may be individual IP addresses or CIDR ranges in either address family; forwarded for, proto, and host values are hop-aligned.
